technologies.name: Jira
technologies.evidence: The customer, a pioneer in the Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) security startup space, had a number of operational challenges within its Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) team that resulted in productivity and incident management issues. The main issues were: ... Manual searches for and cross-referencing of key information across tools such as Jira and Confluence during incidents was painfully slow, resulting in delayed resolutions.
technologies.reasoning: Jira is explicitly mentioned as one of the tools used by the SRE team for incident management.

technologies.name: Slack
technologies.evidence: The tool was developed with a cutting-edge AI stack to provide reliable and user-friendly responses: ... Slack Integration: The user interface is entirely hosted within Slack, enabling the team to work collaboratively and access the data in their main communication channels.
technologies.reasoning: Slack is explicitly mentioned as the platform where the AI-powered chat application is integrated.
